ext_description.message: Send any file Firefox can display directly to your Google Drive in one click.

popup_detecting.description: Status when analyzing the current tab

popup_no_file.description: Message when no file is detected

popup_unsupported.message: This tab doesn't contain a supported file
popup_unsupported.description: Message when the file type is not supported

popup_local_file.description: Message when a local file is detected

popup_link_view.description: Link to view the uploaded file

popup_success.description: Success message with file name placeholder

err_local_file.message: Local files are not supported. Open the file from an online URL.

err_download_failed.description: Error: download failed with status code

err_network.message: Network error. Check your internet connection.

err_private_network.message: Private or local network addresses cannot be processed.

err_timeout.message: The request timed out. Please try again.

err_rate_limit.message: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.

err_google_server.message: Google Drive server error. Please try again later.

onboarding_description.message: Directly upload PDFs, images, and other displayable files from Firefox to Google Drive in a secure, serverless way.

onboarding_feat_formats.message: Supports PDFs, images, audio, video, EPUBs, and Office documents.

onboarding_feat_destination.message: Saves files directly into the "Imports Magic Clipper" folder in your Google Drive.
onboarding_feat_destination.description: Google Drive folder destination list item

onboarding_feat_security.message: 100% local and secure: no third-party servers, direct Google OAuth2 connection.
onboarding_feat_security.description: Direct auth and privacy list item

popup_state_downloading_eta.description: Progress state with ETA: downloading from web

popup_state_uploading_eta.description: Progress state with ETA: uploading to Drive

popup_state_action_cancel_announce.message: You can now cancel the active transfer.
popup_state_action_cancel_announce.description: Accessible announcement when action button turns into Cancel

progress_label.description: Aria label for the upload progress bar

err_file_too_large.message: The file is too large (maximum size is 200 MB).

err_upload_in_progress.message: An upload is already in progress.

err_content_mismatch.message: The server returned an unexpected response (login page?). Try opening the file directly.
err_content_mismatch.description: Error: downloaded content type doesn't match expected type

popup_disconnect_confirm_announce.description: Accessible announcement when disconnect button enters confirm mode

popup_disconnected_status.message: Signed out. Click Send to reconnect.
